opportunity.title: MLH Fellowship Spring/Summer 2026
opportunity.eligibility: Currently enrolled student OR recent graduate (within 1 year). No CGPA minimum. Strong GitHub portfolio preferred.
opportunity.summary: 12-week fully remote fellowship with $5,000 stipend. Tracks include Open Source, Explorer, and Production Engineering. Open to Pakistani students.

opportunity.eligibility: CS / SE / IT undergraduate (Semester 4 or above). Minimum CGPA 3.0.

opportunity.title: Fulbright Scholarship 2026-27
opportunity.eligibility: Pakistani citizen. Minimum 16 years of education (BS/BE). Minimum CGPA 3.0. No prior US degree.
opportunity.summary: Fully funded MS/PhD in the USA. Covers tuition, living allowance, airfare, health insurance, and book allowance. Highest prestige scholarship available to Pakistani students.
opportunity.rawSnippet: The United States Educational Foundation in Pakistan (USEFP) invites applications for the Fulbright Scholarship...

opportunity.title: HEC Need-Based Scholarship 2026
opportunity.eligibility: Pakistani national enrolled in BS/BE. Minimum CGPA 2.5. Annual family income below PKR 600,000. Semester 2–8.
requiredDocs: Income certificate from NADRA / Union Council
opportunity.summary: PKR 10,000/month stipend plus full tuition waiver for financially deserving Pakistani undergraduates. One of the most accessible HEC programs with a low CGPA bar.
opportunity.rawSnippet: The Higher Education Commission of Pakistan is pleased to announce the HEC Need-Based Scholarship Program 2026...
